## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is a single, focused change (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` (type-check) passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated at least one meaningful test for changed logic (if applicable)
- [ ] Database schema changes include a Prisma migration (if applicable)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated for any new environment variables
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, or real hostnames/IPs committed
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Review requested from @MoustafaWehbe
